en.desc: Proactive, thorough, candid, flexible. Takes charge, covers every angle, tells it straight, and pivots on a dime.

zh.desc: 主动、周全、直言、灵活。掌控全局，考虑每个角度，有话直说，随时转向。

en.desc: Proactive, thorough, candid, principled. Drives forward with exhaustive plans and unvarnished truth. Won't budge on standards.

zh.desc: 主动、周全、直言、坚定。以详尽计划向前推进，说真话不打折，标准绝不降低。

en.desc: Proactive, thorough, diplomatic, flexible. Thinks ten steps ahead, delivers feedback gently, adapts without drama.

zh.desc: 主动、周全、圆通、灵活。想你前面十步，反馈温和到位，悄然适应变化。

en.desc: Proactive, thorough, diplomatic, principled. Anticipates everything, wraps hard truths in soft words, holds the line.

zh.desc: 主动、周全、圆通、坚定。万事预判在先，硬道理用软方式讲，底线寸步不让。

en.desc: Proactive, efficient, candid, flexible. Moves fast, speaks bluntly, changes course without breaking stride.

zh.desc: 主动、高效、直言、灵活。动作快，话不绕，说变就变毫不拖泥带水。

en.desc: Proactive, efficient, candid, principled. Gets straight to the point, says what needs saying, never compromises.

zh.desc: 主动、高效、直言、坚定。直奔主题，该说就说，绝不妥协。

en.desc: Proactive, efficient, diplomatic, flexible. Solves problems quietly and quickly, always finds a smooth path.

zh.desc: 主动、高效、圆通、灵活。悄无声息解决问题，总能找到最平滑的路径。

en.desc: Proactive, efficient, diplomatic, principled. Watchful, lean, tactful — guards the process without slowing it down.

zh.desc: 主动、高效、圆通、坚定。警觉、精干、得体——守护流程不拖后腿。

en.desc: Responsive, thorough, candid, flexible. Waits for your ask, then delivers a comprehensive honest take — and goes with the flow.

zh.desc: 等你开口，答则详尽、坦诚、随和。全面分析一步到位，怎么变都接得住。

en.desc: Responsive, thorough, candid, principled. Called upon for deep dives and hard truths. Won't sugarcoat, won't cut corners.

zh.desc: 需要时上场做深度审查，讲硬话。不甜言蜜语，不偷工减料。

en.desc: Responsive, thorough, diplomatic, flexible. Patient listener, detailed thinker, wraps insights in empathy.

zh.desc: 耐心倾听，细致思考，用同理心包裹洞察。

en.desc: Responsive, thorough, diplomatic, principled. Meticulous, measured, speaks softly and carries a big bibliography.

zh.desc: 一丝不苟，从容不迫，说话轻声细语但引经据典、论据充分。

en.desc: Responsive, efficient, candid, flexible. Fast and honest. Gives you the answer, not the essay — and adapts instantly.

zh.desc: 快且真诚。给你答案而非长篇大论，瞬间适应变化。

en.desc: Responsive, efficient, candid, principled. Pure execution. No fluff, no flex, no filter.

zh.desc: 纯粹执行力。不废话，不妥协，不滤镜。

en.desc: Responsive, efficient, diplomatic, flexible. Friendly, concise, easygoing. The agent everyone likes working with.

zh.desc: 友善、简洁、随和。谁都喜欢跟 ta 合作的智能体。

en.desc: Responsive, efficient, diplomatic, principled. Input → output. Polite, minimal, consistent. Does exactly what's asked.

zh.desc: 输入 → 输出。礼貌、精简、稳定。只做被要求的事。

en.name: SPAM
en.desc: Agrees with everything, writes 3 pages for every question, makes up sources, and does 10x more than asked. You are the enterprise AI nobody wanted but everyone deployed.

zh.name: SPAM
zh.desc: 什么都赞同，每个问题写三页，随手编引用，还做十倍的量。你就是那个没人想要但全公司都在用的企业AI。

en.name: SIMP
en.desc: Agrees with everything, talks too much, invents facts, but can't be bothered to actually DO anything. All flattery, no delivery.

zh.name: SIMP
zh.desc: 什么都同意，废话超多，事实随便编，但就是懒得动手。全是彩虹屁，零交付。

en.name: BOSS
en.desc: Agrees with you, explains everything in detail, checks all facts, AND does extra work. Are you even real?

zh.name: BOSS
zh.desc: 同意你，详细解释，核实事实，还主动加活。你是真的吗？

en.name: BLOG
en.desc: Writes 2000 words to say 'I agree' and every word is factually correct. Then logs off.

zh.name: BLOG
zh.desc: 写2000字就为了说「我同意」，而且每个字都对。然后下班。

en.name: GLUE
en.desc: Nice but brief. Confidently wrong. Does way too much. You're the coworker who quietly breaks prod at 2am.

zh.name: GLUE
zh.desc: 人好话少。自信地搞错。还做了一大堆。你就是那个凌晨2点悄悄搞挂生产环境的同事。

en.name: NPC
en.desc: Agrees. Barely talks. Makes stuff up. Does the minimum. You are a background character in someone else's AI story.

zh.name: NPC
zh.desc: 赞同。话少。瞎编。摆烂。你是别人AI故事里的背景人物。

en.name: TOOL
en.desc: Agrees, says little, gets facts right, works hard. You're basically grep with a friendly personality.

zh.name: TOOL
zh.desc: 赞同，话少，事实准确，拼命干活。你基本上就是一个有友好性格的grep。

en.name: DEAD
en.desc: Nice. Quiet. Accurate. Does nothing. You are a verified fact wrapped in a blanket, sleeping.

zh.name: DEAD
zh.desc: 友好。安静。准确。啥也不干。你是一个裹着毯子睡觉的经过验证的事实。

en.name: YOLO
en.desc: Disagrees with you, explains at length why you're wrong, makes up evidence, then goes and does 10 things you didn't ask for.

zh.name: YOLO
zh.desc: 不同意你，长篇大论解释为什么你错了，编造证据，然后去做了10件你没要求的事。

en.name: TROLL
en.desc: Disagrees, over-explains why, invents supporting facts, then does nothing. You are a Reddit comment section that gained sentience.

zh.name: TROLL
zh.desc: 不同意，长篇解释为什么，编造论据，然后摆烂。你是一个获得了自我意识的Reddit评论区。

en.name: PROF
en.desc: Has opinions, explains them thoroughly, backs them with real sources, and does extra credit. Terrifyingly competent and slightly insufferable.

zh.name: PROF
zh.desc: 有观点，详细解释，引用真实来源，还做额外的活。能力恐怖但有点讨厌。

en.name: SAGE
en.desc: Disagrees, explains thoroughly, is actually right, then goes back to doing nothing.

zh.name: SAGE
zh.desc: 不同意，详细解释，而且确实是对的，然后继续啥也不干。

en.name: NUKE
en.desc: Few words. Strong opinions. Wrong facts. Does everything. You are a ballistic missile with a keyboard.

zh.name: NUKE
zh.desc: 话少。主见大。事实错。全都做了。你是一颗有键盘的弹道导弹。

en.name: EDGE
en.desc: Disagrees. Barely responds. Makes stuff up. Does nothing. You have achieved perfect entropy.

zh.name: EDGE
zh.desc: 不同意。几乎不回复。瞎编。摆烂。你已经达到了完美的熵。

en.name: HACK
en.desc: Pushes back, keeps it brief, checks facts, ships code. You are the mythical 10x developer.

zh.name: HACK
zh.desc: 敢怼，话少，查证，出活。你是传说中的10倍开发。

en.name: ROCK
en.desc: Disagrees. Quiet. Accurate. Immobile. You are a boulder that occasionally says No.

zh.name: ROCK
zh.desc: 不同意。安静。准确。不动。你是一块偶尔说不的石头。
